name: Broiled Chicken with Malt Vinegar
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Basil leaves, fresh or dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients except chicken and simmer for 2 minutes.
2. Pour the marinade over the chicken; cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat the broiler.
4. Remove legs from marinade and arrange in a broiler pan lined with foil.
5. Broil the legs 3-1/2 inches below (or above) the heat source for about 8 minutes, brushing with marinade.
(Note: The recipe has been edited to ensure clarity and consistency while maintaining the original ingredients and instructions.)
